introduction:
In Madhya Pradesh, aspiring drivers must initially be equipped with a Learner's Licence (LL) before taking up the wheel permanently with a Permanent Driving Licence (DL).

The MP Government encourages driving education while ensuring applications are processed digitally efficiently over Sarathi platforms.
quickFacts:
Crucial Path
  • LL Framework: Valid 6 months. Applicable via E-KYC Aadhaar modules rendering tests from home possible.
  • DL Framework: A stringent wait parameter of 30 days.
  • Testing is strictly physical per MoRTH regulations on RTO tracks.
documentsRequired:
Documents Required

For Learner's Licence (LL)
  • Aadhaar Card (Highly Recommended)
  • Address Validation Document
  • Clear physical photograph
  • Form 1 Digital Declaration
For Permanent DL
  • Original Computer Generated LL
  • Application Payment Acknowledgment
  • Valid RC Proof for the corresponding class
  • Medical declaration checklist
onlineApplication:
How to Apply Online

Phase A: Retrieve the LL Card
  1. Connect to sarathi.parivahan.gov.in targeting Madhya Pradesh.
  2. Apply using the faceless Aadhaar-bound method.
  3. Complete the transaction protocol and document verification loop digitally.
  4. Perform the AI watched traffic regulations test and capture your LL certificate locally.
Phase B: Capture the DL
  1. Upon crossing the 30-day mandate, file for the DL upgrade.
  2. Map the LL data over and settle MP transport regulatory fees.
  3. Reserve your driving test evaluation block accurately matching calendar capacity constraints.
offlineApplication:
How to Apply Offline / Driving Test

  1. Presently, there is no escape to practical analysis. Walk in at the MP RTO 30 mins ahead of slot boundaries.
  2. Follow the MVI (Motor Vehicle Inspector) instructions closely deploying smooth transitions across 8-grids, inclines, and turns.
afterApplying: Once Approved: The MP Parivahan team will stamp approval on systems generating an immediate virtual locker copy. Expect your high-security Smart Card within traditional dispatch windows.
helpfulLinks: MoRTH Sarathi Portal MP Transport Dept
